nasb.text: for today in the city of David there has been born for you a Savior, who is Christ the Lord.

esv.text: For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, who is Christ the Lord.

cnv.text: 今天在大衛的城裡，為你們生了救主，就是主基督。

ccb.text: 今天在大卫的城里有一位救主为你们降生了，祂就是主基督！

csbs.text: 今天，在大卫的城里，为你们诞生了一位救主，他就是主基督。
